questionHtml: Enantiomers can be identified using a polarimeter. Outline how this instrument differentiates the enantiomers.
markschemeHtml:
«plane-»polarized light passed through sample  [✔]


analyser/second polarizer determines angle of rotation of plane of plane-polarized light
OR
each enantiomer rotates plane «of plane-polarized light» in opposite directions «by the same angle»  [✔]

meta.title: Enantiomers can be identified using a polarimeter. Outline how this instrument differentiates the enantiomers.
